title: BauPreis AI
summary_en: Production SaaS for German construction firms. Upload plans, get AI-driven cost breakdowns, generate quotes. Multi-tenant, role-based, audit-logged.
summary_de: Production-SaaS für deutsche Baufirmen. Pläne hochladen, KI-Kostenanalyse, Angebote generieren. Multi-Tenant, rollenbasiert, mit Audit-Log.

title: MONO Men Only
summary_en: Mobile-first booking platform for an exclusive male grooming network. React Native, Stripe, push notifications, calendar sync. Currently in private beta.
summary_de: Mobile-First-Buchungsplattform für ein exklusives Männer-Grooming-Netzwerk. React Native, Stripe, Push-Benachrichtigungen, Kalender-Sync. Derzeit Private Beta.

title: EDMI
summary_en: Apple-style bento landing for a dental microscope vendor. 7 real microscopes (Zeiss, CJ-Optik), 11 accessories, AI configurator, real pricing.
summary_de: Apple-Style Bento-Landing für einen Dentalmikroskop-Anbieter. 7 echte Mikroskope (Zeiss, CJ-Optik), 11 Zubehörteile, KI-Konfigurator, reale Preise.

title: StormGuard Professional
summary_en: Production e-commerce for premium organic pet cosmetics. Three languages (EN/DE/BG), full product catalog, order system, Cloudflare Pages.
summary_de: Production-E-Commerce für Bio-Tierpflege. Drei Sprachen (EN/DE/BG), Produktkatalog, Bestellsystem, Cloudflare Pages.

title: Eko-OYLIS
summary_en: Business landing for a waste oil collection service. Bilingual, contact form via FormSubmit, mobile-optimized, deployed on GitHub Pages.
summary_de: Business-Landing für einen Altöl-Sammelservice. Zweisprachig, Kontaktformular via FormSubmit, mobil-optimiert, GitHub Pages.

title: RundUmsHaus Littawe
summary_en: Marketing website for a house maintenance and garden care business. SEO-optimized, responsive, service catalog with direct contact integration.
summary_de: Marketing-Website für Hausmeister- und Gartenpflegedienste. SEO-optimiert, responsiv, Leistungskatalog mit direkter Kontaktintegration.

title: Provenly Homes
summary_en: Owner-onboarding landing for a short-term rental management service in NRW. Three service tiers, automated pricing logic, guest communication.
summary_de: Eigentümer-Onboarding-Landing für Kurzzeitvermietungs-Management in NRW. Drei Servicestufen, automatisierte Preislogik, Gästekommunikation.

title: Studio of Glamour
summary_en: Modern website for a Munich eyelash extension studio. Service catalog with pricing, online booking, gallery. Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui.
summary_de: Moderne Website für ein Münchner Wimpernstudio. Leistungskatalog mit Preisen, Online-Buchung, Galerie. Next.js + Tailwind + shadcn/ui.
